creator: dominique.goncalves@gmail.com
text:
Update gcstar to 1.5.0

files/patch-install fixes hardcoded path.

Changelog is available at https://mail.gna.org/public/gcstar-release/2009-11/msg00000.html

Fix: 

Apply the following patch:

http://djdomics.free.fr/FreeBSD/gnome/patches/gcstar-1.5.0.diff
